name: Gift Idea Finder
description: Find personalized gift ideas based on the recipient's interests

agents.name: Gift Researcher
agents.purpose: Find gift ideas based on recipient's interests and budget
agents.system_prompt_hint: Research gift ideas matching the recipient's interests, age, and the specified budget. Find specific products with prices and links. Include a mix of practical, fun, and unique options.

agents.name: Gift Curator
agents.purpose: Curate and present the best gift options
agents.system_prompt_hint: Present the top 10 gift ideas organized by category. Include price, where to buy, and why it's a good fit. Add a personal touch recommendation for each.

suggestion_card.title: Gift Finder
suggestion_card.subtitle: Find perfect gifts for anyone
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Find gift ideas for [person] who likes [interests], budget [amount]

author: agentfactory
